OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Blessing Muzarabani bowling to Ryan Rickelton, Hits the Bulls-Eye! short of good length ball, pitching outside leg stump, Ryan Rickelton drives this towards long-off, he comes for the second but is sent back by Tilak. Rickelton turns down and slips while coming back, Anukul Roy, the man on a mission in the field again, fires a direct hit, finds Rickelton short of the crease! 

WICKET Ryan Rickelton run out Anukul Roy (Mumbai Indians 184 Runs for 3 wickets)

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Sunil Narine to Hardik Pandya -  ONE RUN !!!
OverHistory.Commentry: Sunil Narine bowling to Hardik Pandya, good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Hardik Pandya plays a slog shot for a single towards Deep Mid-Wicket
OverHistory.UPDCommentry: Sunil Narine bowling to Hardik Pandya, good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Hardik Pandya plays a slog shot for a single towards Deep Mid-Wicket

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Sunil Narine to Tilak Varma Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Sunil Narine bowling to Tilak Varma, good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Tilak Varma plays an aggressive lofted on drive on the front foot WICKET Tilak Varma c Manish Pandey b Sunil Narine (Mumbai Indians 215 Runs for 4 wickets) towards Long-On
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Sunil Narine bowling to N Tilak Varma, Tilak Varma Departs! good length ball, pitching outside off stump, N Tilak Varma gets under the ball and goes for a big loft in a hurry to finish the game, but does not time that well. Manish Pandey at long-on hangs on and takes the catch! A wicket too late for KKR
WICKET N Tilak Varma c Manish Pandey b Sunil Narine (Mumbai Indians 215 Runs for 4 wickets)

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Sunil Narine to Naman Dhir -  ONE RUN !!!

OverHistory.UPDCommentry: Sunil Narine bowling to Naman Dhir, good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Naman Dhir plays an aggressive off drive on the back foot for a single towards Long-Off

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Sunil Narine to Hardik Pandya - FOUR RUNS !!!
OverHistory.Commentry: Sunil Narine bowling to Hardik Pandya, good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Hardik Pandya plays an aggressive pull shot on the back foot for 4 runs towards Country
OverHistory.UPDCommentry: Sunil Narine bowling to Hardik Pandya, Just a Hit Away! good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Hardik Pandya hangs back and pulls this in the gap for a boundary!

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Anukul Roy to Naman Dhir - FOUR RUNS !!!
OverHistory.Commentry: Anukul Roy bowling to Naman Dhir, full length ball, pitching on off stump, Naman Dhir plays an aggressive off drive on the front foot for 4 runs towards Long-Off
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Anukul Roy bowling to Naman Dhir, MI has finally done this! They have won their season opener for the first time since 2012! full length ball, pitching on off stump, Naman Dhir gets this past the mid-off with an excellent drive as MI go bang bang with a solid six-wicket win!
